'''dahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibroxane|nibroxane]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibroxane|nibroxane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dahaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhækæth|dæhækæth]] || [[word:dæhækæj|dæhækæj]] || [[word:dæhækæsh|dæhækæsh]] || [[word:dæhækæ|dæhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahahakath|dahahakath]] || [[word:dahahakaj|dahahakaj]] || [[word:dahahakash|dahahakash]] || [[word:dahahaka|dahahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahakath|dahakath]] || [[word:dahakaj|dahakaj]] || [[word:dahakash|dahakash]] || [[word:dahaka|dahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahafkath|dahafkath]] || [[word:dahafkaj|dahafkaj]] || [[word:dahafkash|dahafkash]] || [[word:dahafkaf|dahafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahakatha|dahakatha]] || [[word:dahakaja|dahakaja]] || [[word:dahakasha|dahakasha]] || [[word:dahakaka|dahakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahakath|dahakath]] || [[word:dahakaj|dahakaj]] || [[word:dahakash|dahakash]] || [[word:dahaka|dahaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahakathal|dahakathal]] || [[word:dahakajal|dahakajal]] || [[word:dahakashal|dahakashal]] || [[word:dahakakal|dahakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahakathatha|dahakathatha]] || [[word:dahakajaja|dahakajaja]] || [[word:dahakashasha|dahakashasha]] || [[word:dahakaka|dahakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahakathan|dahakathan]] || [[word:dahakajan|dahakajan]] || [[word:dahakashan|dahakashan]] || [[word:dahakakan|dahakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahakathaoro|dahakathaoro]] || [[word:dahakajaoro|dahakajaoro]] || [[word:dahakashaoro|dahakashaoro]] || [[word:dahakakaoro|dahakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
